name: l2_actuator_disk_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskSourceMap maps hover actuator-disk pressure jumps into per-rotor force and moment targets.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 actuator disk source-map packet.

name: l2_actuator_disk_load
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskCalibration supplies the momentum-theory pressure jump and induced-velocity basis used by this source map.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 actuator disk source-map packet.

name: l2_rotor_disk_aperture
value: Aerodynamics4McL2RotorDiskAperture supplies rotor disk axes open area and static-mask coverage for each source term.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 actuator disk source-map packet.

name: l2_drone_probe
value: Aerodynamics4McL2DroneProbe supplies the bounded wind-tunnel geometry and static airframe mask used before powered source terms are fitted.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 actuator disk source-map packet.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered source-term force and moment validation.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 actuator disk source-map packet.

name: hover_force_moment_target

note: Source-map packet is a validation target before runtime powered-source integration.
